burden.dalyPerCapita: moderate; progression to NASH/cirrhosis in a subset

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Imaging evidence of steatosis plus exclusion of significant alcohol use; fibrosis assessment as needed

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Ultrasound in primary care; elastography in tertiary centers
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Weight loss, diet and exercise, control of diabetes and lipids
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Limited structured lifestyle programs and fibrosis staging access
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Large NCD programs and growing hepatology services
